postings: Hugging Face expertise is a frequent requirement for AI and machine‑learning positions posted for 2025‑2026, with roles ranging from AI/ML Engineer (focused on PyTorch, Hugging Face, and NLP for content moderation) that asks for a computer‑science‑related degree and three or more years of experience, to Gen AI/Machine‑Learning Engineer positions that list Hugging Face alongside LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI, Azure OpenAI and Anthropic, and to Artificial‑Intelligence Engineer jobs that cite solid experience with Hugging Face, PyTorch, TensorFlow or scikit‑learn. Additionally, AI Research Engineer openings emphasize hands‑on work with Hugging Face Transformers, PyTorch‑Lightning and LLM fine‑tuning, while several companies also advertise “Machine Learning Engineer New‑Grad” opportunities for the 2025‑2026 hiring cycle, indicating strong demand for fresh talent with Hugging Face skills.
velocity: In early 2025 Hugging Face listed several AI‑focused machine‑learning positions that were posted within the most recent two‑week window, including a Cloud Machine Learning Engineer (remote, both US and EMEA), a Senior Open‑Source Machine Learning Engineer specializing in Computer Vision (remote), a Data/Infrastructure Advocate Engineer (remote for both US and EMEA regions), and a Machine Learning Research Engineer role supporting open‑source robotics and vision projects; all of these openings emphasized expertise in large‑language‑model development, PyTorch or TensorFlow, cloud‑native deployment, and collaborative open‑source contributions.
